'''Verdrellig''' was a company that produced [[Deflector shield generator/Legends|deflector shield generators]]. They manufactured the [[AF Double Strobe Shield Generator]] which was used aboard the [[Kuari Princess/Legends|''Kuari Princess'']].

==Appearances==
*[[Riders of the Maelstrom (adventure)|''Riders of the Maelstrom'']] {{Reprint|Riders of the Maelstrom (adventure)}} {{1stm}}
